label: 1524 CE
era_summary: Year 1524 (MDXXIV) was a leap year starting on Friday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1524 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1524: France, Navarre-emperor, Spain, England, Italian states (from 1523),pope, 1521-25; Spain-Guatamala, 1522-24; Spain-Honduras, 1524-26. Maddison records GDP/capita 1352 (ESP, 1524) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
